messages.content:
Here are Pikachu's base stats:

| Stat | Value |
|------|-------|
| HP | 35 |
| Attack | 55 |
| Defense | 40 |
| Sp. Attack | 50 |
| Sp. Defense | 50 |
| **Speed** | **90** |

Pikachu is a pure Electric type with decent Speed being its standout stat. Its abilities are **Static** (may paralyze on contact) and the hidden ability **Lightning Rod** (draws Electric moves, raises Sp. Atk).

messages.content:
They're nearly identical moves — just different types and status effects:

| | Thunderbolt | Flamethrower |
|--|--|--|
| Type | Electric | Fire |
| Category | Special | Special |
| Power | 90 | 90 |
| Accuracy | 100% | 100% |
| PP | 15 | 15 |
| Effect | 10% Paralyze | 10% Burn |

The only meaningful differences:
- **Paralysis** (Thunderbolt) halves the target's Speed and has a chance to skip turns — generally considered the stronger status
- **Burn** (Flamethrower) deals chip damage each turn and halves the target's Attack (less useful against special attackers)

Both are among the most reliable moves in the game. Choice between them comes down to type coverage needed on your team.
